title: Bioanalysis with CSV input
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol preps 1.5mL and 2mL tubes from stock solutions including but not limited to acetonitrile, water, and methanol. Sources and destinations are determined via a csv uploaded by the user, as well as transfer volumes. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `csv file`: The csv file should be formatted like so. Note - for no mix steps, input "0" for the mix repetition. Also specify whether to mix at the source, or destination tube for that row: * Note: for aspiration height percent (column J), a value of 10 means that we will be aspirating from 10% of the tube depth, 50 will be 50% of the tube depth, etc. * `P20/P1000 Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) for each single channel pipette. ---
steps_raw: This protocol preps 1.5mL and 2mL tubes from stock solutions including but not limited to acetonitrile, water, and methanol. Sources and destinations are determined via a csv uploaded by the user, as well as transfer volumes. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `csv file`: The csv file should be formatted like so. Note - for no mix steps, input "0" for the mix repetition. Also specify whether to mix at the source, or destination tube for that row: * Note: for aspiration height percent (column J), a value of 10 means that we will be aspirating from 10% of the tube depth, 50 will be 50% of the tube depth, etc. * `P20/P1000 Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) for each single channel pipette. ---
OT-2 visits source labware, source well.
Volume is transferred to destination labware, destination well as specified in the csv.
New tip is granted (note for transfer volumes < 100ul, the P20 pipette is used, otherwise the P1000 pipette is used).
Steps 2-4 are repeated for all lines of the csv.
materials_raw: Opentrons 4-in-1 tube rack with 50mL & 15mL Falcon tubes
Opentrons 4-in-1 tube rack with 1.5mL Eppendorf snap cap tubes
